economic_notes: First Nation has multiple related entities including Saskay Land Development Corporation, Saskay Land Development Limited Partnership, KFN Enterprises Limited Partnership, KFN Enterprises Ltd., Choxw Holdings Corporation, Kwikwetlem Land Management Inc., Kwikwetlem Land Management Limited Partnership, Kwikwetlem Holdings Inc., Kwikwetlem Holdings Limited Partnership, Kwosel Land Development Ltd., Kwosel Land Development Limited Partnership, Saskay Consulting Inc., Saskay Consulting Limited Partnership. Contributed to BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Limited Partnership. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event.
notes: Prior year (2019) figures were restated due to corrections in: (1) KFN Enterprises LP joint venture income reporting, (2) Social Housing Program amortization policy correction under PS3150, and (3) replacement reserve reclassification from accumulated surplus to liability under PS3100. Long-term debt includes callable debt of $966,221 and CMHC mortgages of $592,513. GBEs (KFN Enterprises LP, KFN Enterprises Ltd., Choxw Holdings Corporation) accounted for on modified equity basis with combined negative equity of $1,124,058. Band member profit sharing expense of $1,120,000 is notable. Subsequent events include COVID-19 pandemic impact, two pending legal cases, a $70,000 post-year-end legal settlement, and significant staff turnover. No schedule of remuneration was included in the provided financial statements. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $1,538,531 + Province of BC $2,854,446 + Fraser Health Authority $138,378 + First Nations Health Authority $113,720 + Government of Canada $99,290 + CMHC subsidies $47004 + BC Housing $5,000 + FN Lands Management Resource Centre $123,250 - Health Canada already in Fraser Health = $4,919,619; adjusted using Fraser Health $138,378 as Health Canada proxy giving $4,813,319.
